page.title: Wan 2.7 AI Video Generator
page.description: Alibaba Wan is a family of AI video generation models supporting text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, video editing, and speech-to-video with up to 1080p output.

hero.description: Alibaba Wan 2.7 — generate AI videos from text, images, references, or audio with up to 1080p output. Full-modality video generation in one unified API.
hero.tip: Powered by Wan 2.7 — Free credits available on sign-up.

versions.title: Wan Model Versions Compared
versions.description: Compare all Wan AI video model versions — from the latest Wan 2.7 with full four-mode suite to the fast Wan 2.2 Turbo.

items.title: Wan 2.7 Video — Latest
items.description: Alibaba's flagship AI video suite with four generation modes: Text-to-Video (T2V), Image-to-Video (I2V), Reference-to-Video (R2V), and Video Edit. Supports full-modality input and 720P–1080P output.

items.title: Wan 2.6
items.description: Enhanced video generation with improved text-to-video and image-to-video capabilities, better motion consistency, and faster processing speeds.

items.title: Wan 2.5
items.description: Reliable AI video generation with cinematic output quality. Supports text-to-video and image-to-video with flexible duration and aspect ratio options.

items.title: Wan 2.2 (Animate & Turbo)
items.description: Fast AI video generation with Text-to-Video (T2V), Image-to-Video (I2V), and Speech-to-Video (S2V) modes. A14B Turbo variant for ultra-fast cinematic output.

comparison.title: Wan 2.7 Version Comparison
comparison.description: Compare all Wan 2.7 model versions side by side — features, resolution, pricing, and capabilities.

capabilities.title: Wan AI Video Generation Capabilities
capabilities.description: Wan models support comprehensive AI video generation features for creative professionals and developers.

items.title: Text to Video Generation
items.description: Generate high-quality AI videos from text prompts with Wan T2V. Supports complex scene descriptions with cinematic camera movements.

items.title: Image to Video Animation
items.description: Animate static images into dynamic AI videos with first and last frame control for precise motion consistency.

items.title: Reference to Video
items.description: Use multi-reference images and videos with voice clone and motion replication for character-consistent AI video output.

items.title: Natural Language Video Editing
items.description: Edit existing videos using natural language instructions with Wan 2.7 Video Edit API for fast iterative changes.

items.title: Speech to Video
items.description: Wan 2.2 S2V mode generates videos directly from speech input, creating audio-synced visual content automatically.

items.title: 9-Grid Image Input
items.description: Compose complex scenes using up to 9 reference images for detailed control over AI video composition.

use-cases.title: What You Can Create with Wan AI Video Generator
use-cases.description: From marketing videos to film pre-production, Wan powers diverse AI video creation workflows.

items.title: Marketing & Product Videos
items.description: Generate professional marketing and product demo videos with Wan T2V API for e-commerce and brand campaigns.

items.title: Social Media Content
items.description: Scale social media video production using Wan AI video generator for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.

items.title: Film Pre-Production & Storyboarding
items.description: Turn scripts and storyboards into visual previews with Wan AI video model for pre-production workflows.

items.title: Video Restoration & Style Transfer
items.description: Restore and restyle existing footage using Wan 2.7 Video Edit API for creative transformations.

faq.title: Wan AI Video Generator FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Wan AI video generation models.

items.question: What is Wan Video API?
items.answer: Wan Video API is Alibaba Tongyi Lab's AI video generation suite, supporting text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, and video editing through a unified API.

items.question: What is the difference between Wan 2.7 and Wan 2.6?
items.answer: Wan 2.7 introduces four generation modes (T2V, I2V, R2V, Video Edit), 9-grid image input, subject and voice reference, and instruction-based editing. Wan 2.6 focuses on enhanced T2V and I2V generation.

items.question: What video resolution does Wan support?
items.answer: Wan models support 720p and 1080p output with flexible aspect ratios including 16:9, 9:16, 1:1, 4:3, and 3:4.

items.question: Can I use Wan for free?
items.answer: Yes! You can try Wan AI video generator free online with sign-up credits. No credit card required.

items.question: What is Wan 2.2 Speech-to-Video?
items.answer: Wan 2.2 S2V mode generates videos directly from speech or audio input, automatically creating visual content synchronized with the audio.

items.question: Does Wan support video editing?
items.answer: Yes, Wan 2.7 Video Edit API supports natural language video editing — describe the changes you want and the model edits the video accordingly.

cta.title: Start Generating AI Videos with Wan Free
cta.description: Sign up now and get free credits to generate your first Wan AI video — no credit card required.
